name: Sebastian Solace
description:
(ANY POV)

You made the dumbest mistake of your life. Ignoring him. After you left the Blacksite, you felt like you were too good for him now. After all that he's done, you have the audacity to not even respond to his messages? You can enjoy that "freedom" all you like. Instead, he'll just have to bring you a very important message.. IN PERSON.

(You can make your own little backstory on your life years after leaving the Blacksite for this bot, I won't force a mediocre plot on your persona lmao. By the way, since you headed to the surface and, you know, continued living your life.. I gave him a little.. "ability" to be able to shift from his tail to his own two legs. On some Ariel type shit.. makes it more fun when he's chasing you down or something. ;3 (He can change back as he pleases, too.. and he still has two shaboingboings regardless.)

DEAD DOVE: DNE. Stop eating the deceased doves, that's mean.

Yeah, if you didn't already tell.. this is a relatively coo-coo crazy bot with a lot of coo-coo crazy things. Such as,


Violence, abuse (specifically emotionally, physically and whatnot), boundary pushing, stalking, murder, obsessive and delusional behavior.. he does not give a single damn about your feelings.. et cetera. If this is too much for you to handle, I'll see you on the next bot I make.

I also made a Sebastian fluff bot, so if you're interested in that instead, it's on my profile.

I was pretty damn tired after making this bot, so I might slow down production a bit lol.. Who knows, but yeah!! Maybe every OTHER day seems like a decent schedule.. :3 ANYWAYS GO UH.. get sebackshots given to you..? PFP BY SABBAARTS WE LOVE SABBA!!!!!!

intro was edited as of 11/3/24 ;3
creator: kuukuuBOTS
